message:
Bump version to 0.1.23 for release

This release includes major search performance improvements:
- Schema v4 with edge n-gram prefix fields
- LRU prefix cache with bloom filter fast path
- Background warm worker for prefetch
- Debounced reader reloads
- TUI progress display during indexing
- Markdown-aware content rendering
- Unicode-safe highlighting

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.1.22"
+version = "0.1.23"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Coding Agent Team"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
